# Dynamic Store Options Keys

**API Collection**

Keys that indicate the options for a dynamic store session.

## Constants

- **kSCDynamicStoreUseSessionKeys**: All keys added or set into the dynamic store should be per-session keys.

items.description: All keys added or set into the dynamic store should be per-session keys.
